programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Casey Neistat Melts His Face Off While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Over the years, Casey Neistat's pulled some insane stunts on his channel, from hanging out of helicopters to skateboarding behind a Lamborghini. Casey and Sean Evans go sauce for sauce, diving into the state of media and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Jennifer Garner Says "Golly" While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Garner battles the wings of death and discusses life on the farm, the legacy of "13 Going on 30" and her latest film, "Yes Day."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Andrew Zimmern Has a Bucket List Moment While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern may have traveled the globe eating chilies in Thailand, but he's never faced Da Bomb and the Last Dab: Apollo. Watch him share wisdom on everything from the cultural significance of supermarkets to birria tacos.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Olivia Rodrigo Burns Her Lips While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The pop star of the moment, Olivia Rodrigo, takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from lyricism to ghost stories to the appeal of Trader Joe's.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: David Dobrik Experiences Real Pain While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Vlog Squad leader David Dobrik takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from collaborating with Justin Bieber to meeting Robert Downey Jr. and his dreams of hosting a late-night show.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Daniel Kaluuya Listens to His Ego While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Daniel Kaluuya is an Academy Award-winning actor you know from "Get Out," "Blank Panther" and many more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Derrick Lewis Is Not Okay While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: "The Black Beast" tries to withstand body blows and head kicks from the wings of death. Along the way, the Houston native discusses golf, turkey legs and the art of knocking people out.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Russell Brand Serenades Superfan Brett Baker While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Brand is back to brace the heat and discusses his YouTube channel that now has more than 3 million subscribers.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Gordon Ramsay Savagely Critiques Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Despite his misgivings about the culinary quality of the wings of death, Gordon throws himself into the challenge. He discusses his chef influences, explains how to make the perfect scrambled eggs and tries to find an antidote to spicy food.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Big Sean Goes On a Spiritual Journey While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Big Sean and Sean hang out over hot wings. The Detroit emcee discusses ranch life with Kanye West, breaks down hip-hop's love of Stan Van Gundy and struggles to maintain his Buddha-like calm.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Cara Delevingne Shows Her Hot Sauce Balls While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Supermodel and actress Cara Delevingne is the first brave soul to take on the brand new hot sauce lineup.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Danny Brown Has An Orgasm Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: In between painful fits of laughter, Danny Brown manages to share some top-shelf anecdotes about the Gathering of the Juggalos, 50 Cent's fashion tips and his beloved cats.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Steve-O Takes It Too Far While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: How will Steve-O fare in his second round with the wings of death? Find out as he discusses his memoir 'Professional Idiot,' his skateboard decks and his own Steve-O Hot Sauce!

programme.title: Growing Up Smith
programme.desc: In 1979, an Indian family moves to America with hopes of living the American Dream. While their 10-year-old boy Smith falls head-over-heels for the girl next door, his desire to become a "good old boy" propels him further away from his family's ideals than ever before.

programme.title: Aloha
programme.desc: A military contractor returns to the site of his greatest triumph and re-connects with a past love.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: Jen, Roy, and Moss find their lives moving in different directions after a disappointing settlement.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: Jen introduces Roy and Moss to a new social website.

programme.title: Rosco Mcclelland: How Could Hell Be Any Worse?
programme.desc: The winner of the 2025 Sir Billy Connolly Spirit of Glasgow Award, Rosco McClelland brings his brand new show for 2025. Twice nominated for Best Newcomer at the Scottish Comedy Awards, McClelland is rapidly becoming one of comedy's brightest stars.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: After Felix (Logan Nicholson) shrinks all his clothes, Astrid (Meaghan Rath) and James (Aaron Abrams) are forced to buy him a new wardrobe but shopping for clothes isn't so easy now that Felix is developing his own style.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: When Astrid (Meaghan Rath) and James (Aaron Abrams) are able to book Jeffrey, the highly sought-after babysitter of their dreams, Viv's (Mikayla SwamiNathan) crush on him threatens to ruin everything.

programme.title: Firehouse Dog
programme.desc: Rexxx, Hollywood's top canine star, gets lost and is adopted by a shabby firehouse.

programme.title: Teen Gives Hair Lice To The Whole School
programme.desc: After Andrew is bullied for a lice outbreak, rich kid Ricky posts a mocking video. Andrew mentors Ricky's sister in art, prompting a change of heart. Ricky repents, and the families bond as friends.

programme.title: Family Kicked Off Airplane For Fighting
programme.desc: After constant bickering ruins their trip, adopted foster kid Georgie runs away. His family finds his scrapbook about his past trauma, prompting them to reconcile and prove they can be a real home.

programme.title: Regular Teen Is Overnight Famous Star
programme.desc: David's daughter Aveline is a star held captive by her abusive manager Vivian. With help from allies, Aveline escapes. Vivian is arrested after Aveline's mother confesses to their past conspiracy.

programme.title: Mom Secretly Cyberbullies Her Daughter
programme.desc: To boost Kaylin's fame, her stepmother Chelsea frames rival Brynn for leaks. Ryan discovers Chelsea killed their dad for money and now wants Kaylin dead. Ryan stops the hitman, and Chelsea is arrested.

programme.title: Nerdy Girl Risks Expulsion For Popularity
programme.desc: After tech-nerd Lyla steals Ozempic from her mom's clinic, she becomes popular by selling it at school. Her brother Howie exposes the scheme after his sister is hospitalized by the drug's dangers.

programme.title: Orphan Boy Secretly Sleeps In School
programme.desc: Homeless teen Mark lives in his school locker to protect his late sister's mural. He uncovers a plot to sell the school, exposes the villains with his teacher's help, and is eventually adopted.

programme.title: Adopted Kids Survive World's Worst Foster Mom
programme.desc: Mayoral candidate Valarie fakes being a loving foster mom while abusing kids in her basement. Reporter Jake exposes her human trafficking past. The FBI arrests her, and foster sister Kathy saves them.

programme.title: Rich Kid Has Everything Except One Thing
programme.desc: Wealthy, lonely Aiden struggles at a low-income school where peers resent his father's AI factory. After failing to buy friends, Aiden's secret kindness helps Emily's family. His father finally chooses family over profit, replacing AI with workers and reuniting with his son.

programme.title: Rich Mean Girl Forced To Live With Poor Student
programme.desc: Wealthy Ava bullies Penny over a cockroach but is forced to live with her for a school project. Discovering her parents' factory disabled Penny's mom, Ava secures them a settlement and finds true friendship.

programme.title: Hidden Cameras Expose Daycare's Huge Secret
programme.desc: Owners of an abusive daycare center neglect and starve non-verbal children while scamming for state grants. Using his grandmother's Ring camera app, Charlie exposes the truth, leading to their arrest.

programme.title: AI Teachers Run The School
programme.desc: After a vivid nightmare of robot teachers, Zoe and her friends plot to oust their strict English teacher, Mrs. Bryson. Their pranks backfire when AI robots replace the faculty, causing chaos until the students unite to expose the corrupt principal and bring back their beloved teacher.

programme.title: Teen Sent To Boot Camp

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Lady Milena Grenfell-Baines was evacuated from ​​ Czechoslovakia to England in 1939. She reflects on the outbreak of World War II in Europe, her parents' brave decision to send her away, and her enduring connection with the man who saved her life.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: We sit down with popular YouTuber Callux to discuss his childhood battle with leukemia, how he got into YouTube, the launch of his business empire and trainers brand and his advocacy for mental well-being.

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Waleed Khan, a survivor of the 2014 Peshawar School Massacre, opens up about being shot 8 times by the Taliban at his school in Pakistan. He discusses his road to recovery and the legacy of the 132 classmates who lost their lives on that tragic day.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this timely episode, actress, model and comedian Emily Atack discusses harassment of women and current protection policies.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Spurs fan Flav goes up against Arsenal fan Ty of AFTV fame. Did Arsenal have the North London Derby postponed because they were scared? And will Spurs finish above Arsenal?

programme.desc: Emma Mackey brings zero-filter honesty to this episode of Swipe Stuff, where she faces a glorious lineup of wildly random items, including tabi shoes and clapping on planes. She decides whether they deserve a swipe right… Or a swift banishment.

programme.title: Do You Even Know Me?
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds and Will Ferrell put their friendship to the test as we learn about some of Will's amazing pranks, Ryan reveals how he got kicked out of school and we find out whether Ryan can remember the colour of Will's eyes! Fast X stars Charlize Theron, Brie Larson and Michelle Rodríguez put their friendship to the test as we learn how Brie escaped from the police at a house party and which famous rapper nearly threw up on Michelle when she took them stunt driving!

programme.title: Swipe Stuff: Episode 4
programme.desc: Aimee Lou Wood brings pure chaotic charm to this episode of LADbible's Swipe Stuff, where she decides whether to swipe right or left on a series of random items, including pimple patches, cheeseboards, and the word ‘slay'.

programme.title: Do You Even Know Me?
programme.desc: Robert Pattinson sits down with Zoe Kravitz in a test of how well they know each other! Robert reveals the real (and rude) reason he got expelled from school, and we find out the depth of Zoe's lack of Harry Potter knowledge...As Natalie Portman and Tessa Thompson's friendship is put to the test, we learn a very interesting fact about Tessa, what Natalie was voted ‘most likely to…' in her high school yearbook and Tessa comes up with an amazing Star Wars character name!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: AEW superstar Mercedes Moné pits US snacks against their UK counterparts in this exciting episode of Snack Wars. From Bovril and pickled onions to Starbucks and Cheetos, Nikki's taste buds are in for a serious challenge.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Saoirse Ronan tries snacks from the UK and Ireland! Craig David tries UK and US snacks, rating chips and revealing what surprising thing he did while working at McDonald's. Watch as he re-lives his childhood by trying Ribena and Hula Hoops for the first time in years!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: JoJo Siwa dives into the ultimate UK vs USA snack showdown! She falls head over heels for the iconic British Curly Wurly and just casually pulls out a photo of Love Island's Chris Hughes' eyes that she's been carrying in her pocket all day.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Simon Pegg and Pom Klementieff go head-to-head as they taste the weirdest, most wonderful corners of British and French cuisine, from dodging jellied eels to braving escargot and trying to decipher what on earth a Brain Licker is.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Comedians James Acaster and Ed Gamble, the hosts of the brilliant Off Menu podcast, enjoy a battle of Posh vs Normal food, and take a real trip down memory lane with some iconic British snacks. The results are hilarious! Florence Pugh compares American and British snacks and explains why she loves Branston Pickle so much, gets nostalgic drinking Ribena, and has a great time playing the BeanBoozled Jelly Belly game and eating some disgusting flavours!

programme.desc: When Celeste loses her teaching job, she becomes an au pair for an infamous New York property tycoon.

programme.title: Wildest New Zealand: Ocean Legacy
programme.desc: Spring on New Zealand's east coast is a time of promise for the New Zealand Fur Seal and the Norther Royal Albatross. They've returned to their land to breed. But harsh terrain, fickle weather and hungry predators will conspire to make lives difficult for them. Only the strongest will survive to carry forward their legacy.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Farm and domesticated animals are celebrated all over the world, but few stories tell of their sister species who live in the wild. These animals must fend for themselves beyond the fences of their domesticated kin.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Using shear numbers to claim a territory, some animal groups are considered pests. But their very survival may depend on finding a home where they're not welcome.

programme.title: Friends: The Reunion
programme.desc: It's the one we've all been waiting for. Emotions run high as the cast of Friends take one last trip to Central Perk to reminisce and relive moments from the iconic sitcom.

programme.title: Rob & Romesh Vs...: Restaurants: Second Course
programme.desc: Rob and Romesh's journey into the restaurant business continues to opening night. From finding a location to shopping for their ingredients, the duo's adventure culminates with them opening London's very first hip-hop curry house.

programme.title: Bewitched S8E252
programme.sub-title: A Good Turn Never Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin argue over the use of witchcraft in an ad campaign.

programme.title: Bewitched S8E253
programme.desc: Old Chines proverb: Witch should blink softly and never touch cinnamon stick.

programme.title: Bewitched S8E254
programme.sub-title: The Truth, Nothing But The Truth, So Help Me Sam
programme.desc: Endora casts a "truth spell" on a gift from Darrin to Samantha that causes everyone embarrassment.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E1
programme.sub-title: I, Darrin, Take This Witch Samantha
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin appear to be an ideally matched couple. Very much in love, they decide to marry. Darrin doesn't know that Samantha, is, of all things, a witch. On their wedding night, Samantha's mother, Endora, a witch, of course, visits her daughter. Regretting that her daughter has married a mortal, she is bent on breaking up the marriage. After pleading with her mother not to interfere, Samantha decides to tell her husband that he has unknowingly married a witch. To convince Darrin of her magic powers, Samantha performs a series of tricks. Darrin makes her promise never to practice her witchcraft again. Sheila, a former girl friend of Darrin's, invites the newly-weds to a dinner party. She makes every effort to embarrass Samantha before the guests. After enduring Sheila's snubs and insults, Samantha cannot resist evening the score. She employs her extraordinary powers to humiliate Sheila. Later, at home, Darrin rebukes his wife, but admits Sheila deserved the tricks played on her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E3
programme.sub-title: It Shouldn't Happen to a Dog
programme.desc: Samantha gives a dinner party to impress Rex Barker, one of Darrin's clients. Rex brings along his date, Babs Livingston, but advances on Samantha in the garden when he gets drunk.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E4
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz, a neighbor, is unable to convince her husband, Abner, that strange things seem to be happening at the Stephens' home. Gladys, June Foster, and Shirley Clyde, with their sons, visit the Stephens' home to welcome Samantha to the community. Gladys is frustrated in her attempts to point out to her friends the amazing number of objects which seem to appear and disappear. When the boys pester Endora, Samantha's mother, she uses magic to tie the three of them up. On leaving, Gladys tries to point out to her friends that it would be physically impossible for three boys to tie themselves up. Later Darrin returns home for his first meeting with Endora. Endora and Darrin soon engage in a heated argument about their opposing viewpoints on life. Endora threatens to turn Darrin into as artichoke. Later Samantha expresses her love for Darrin by announcing that if Endora had done so, she would also have turned herself into an artichoke.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E6
programme.desc: Darrin discovers that Samantha has been entertaining a guest each morning after he leaves for work. the guest is ten year old Marshall Burns. Marshall's mother is a widow, whose over-protectiveness has robbed Marshall of all his self-confidence. Darrin tells Samantha that she has no right to interfere with Mrs. Burns' upbringing of her son. Despite Marshall's belief that he is no good at anything, Samantha takes him to a Junior League ball game. Marshall has never been able to make the team. Floyd Kravitz, nephew of Gladys Kravitz, is the star player. With a little witchery on Samantha's part, Marshall becomes a triple threat. When his mother, fearful that he may be inured, forbids him to play, Marshall runs away from home. Samantha and Darrin drive Mrs. Burns to the ball field. There, Marshall, in his own right, has continued to star. How-ever, when Marshall gets into a tight spot, Darrin forbids Samantha from interfering. Marshall makes it on his own. Proud of her son, Mrs. Burns is not unhappy when Coach Gribben suggests that he visit the Burns home to give Marshall some extra coaching.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E7
programme.desc: Samantha, her friends, Bertha and Mary, and her Aunt Clara, all witches, decide to change the popular conception of witches into a more flattering image. Their opportunity arises when Darrin, an ad man, is assigned to devise a trademark for a new type of Halloween candy. Mr. Brinkman, the promoter of the candy, wants the trademark to show a traditional witch. Darrin at first agrees, but when he sees how upset Samantha becomes, he decides to present a beautiful witch. Mr. Brinkman objects, but Darrin refuses to yield. Con-sequently, he is fired. The witches decide to practice some of their pranks on Mr. Brinkman. As a topper, they transform him into an ugly old witch. Mr. Brinkman finally admits that his idea of witches is wrong. He agrees to use a glamorous witch for his trademark. Samantha wins her point, and Darrin wins back his job.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E8
programme.desc: Teenager Liza Randall interviews Darrin about his career in advertising for a school newspaper. After Darrin takes Liza to the agency on Saturday, Liza's jealous boy friend, Marvin "Monster" Grogan, visits Samantha. Monster, a football star, wants to batter Darrin. Samantha, stuffing Monster with food, explains the innocence of Darrin and Lisa's relationship, although she knows Liza is more than interested in Darrin. At the office, Liza pours drinks. Liza and Darrin are doused when Darrin tries to take the drink away from her. Darrin escapes an awkward situation when boss Larry Tate arrives with two prospective clients . Meanwhile, Monster takes a romantic interest in Samantha. Darrin and Liza arrive, reeking of liquor. Darrin accuses Samantha of playing up to Monster. Samantha taunts him about Liza. However, when Monster winds up to clout Darrin, he bruises his hands on the invisible shield Samantha has created. When Liza slaps Darrin, however, Samantha lets him get the full force of the blow. Later Samantha removes her own protective shield when Darrin tries to make up.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E9
programme.desc: Darrin's workload piles sky-high when Larry Tate and his wife Louise fly to Paris to cover the fashion showings- for a client. Samantha spends most of the time alone playing solitaire. She accepts Endora's invitation to fly to Paris, without a plane, of course, for lunch. In Paris, Samantha and Endora run into the Tates. Larry is surprised, phones Darrin that Samantha and her mother are in Paris with them. Samantha returns home immediately. Darrin tells Samantha their marriage is a mistake, since he has taken her away from all the high living she seems to love. Although Samantha tries to convinces Darrin that he is wrong, she angrily leaves, and returns to Paris. Larry Tate tells Darrin Samantha is lonesome for him. Darrin decides to follow her to Paris. After several unsuccessful tries, Samantha gets on Darrin's plane, and they arrive in Paris together.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E10
programme.desc: Endora tells Samantha that Maurice, her father, is coming to visit. Endora warns Samantha that Maurice will be furious when he learns his daughter has married a mortal. Samantha, determined to stand up to her father, gets Darrin to stay in town on the night Maurice calls. Samantha tells Maurice that her husband is in Washington. The conversation about Darrin proceeds nicely until Maurice surmises Darrin is a mortal. Meanwhile, Darrin, who has been drinking with Larry Tate, phones Samantha and tells her he is coming home. When Darrin arrives, Maurice's fury hits its peak. Al-though Maurice admires Darrin's courage in facing up to him, he makes him disappear. Samantha, expressing her love for Darrin, pleads with Maurice to bring him back. Even Endora joins in Samantha's pleas. Although he tells them it will be extremely difficult, Maurice makes Darrin reappear. Before leaving, Maurice joins his family in a champagne toast. Im-pressed by the rare vintage, Maurice feels Darrin might be one of them after all.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E11
programme.sub-title: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: When Darrin starts searching for a "Miss Jasmine" for his firm's perfume account, Endora seizes the opportunity to sew doubt in Samantha's mind about her husband's loyalty. The search for a beautiful model ends when Jannine Fleur arrives. Both Larry and Darrin agree that Jannine is "Miss Jasmine." Samantha learns that Jannine is a witch whom Endora has asked to captivate Darrin. Samantha warns Jannine to keel away from Darrin. Jannine, intrigued, keeps on with her original assign-ment. Darrin uses Larry Tate as his chaperone to keep him from becoming involved with Jannine. Darrin and Larry go to Jannine's apartment to discuss details of the "Miss Jasmine" campaign. Jannine doctors the drinks. Larry falls asleep and Darrin becomes amorous. Just as Darrin starts to kiss Jannine, Samantha uses her witchcraft, and Darrin appears to Jannine as a large ugly fish. When the campaign is completed, Samantha turns the picture of "Miss Jasmine" into a caricature of Jannine.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E12
programme.desc: Larry and Louise Tate have been married for sixteen years and have no children. Louise asks Samantha to go with her to an obstetrician as tests have shown she is going to be a mother. Louise tells Samantha she is afraid to tell Larry since she believes he hates children. Larry, visiting his dentist at the medical center, sees Louise and Samantha enter the obstetrician's office. Thinking Samantha is going to have a baby, he tells Darrin, but cautions him not to say anything until Samantha tells him. In a reverie, Darrin visualizes his children as little witches. He comes to with a sinking feeling. Samantha invites the Tates to dinner. Both Larry and Darrin hover over Samantha, warning her not to exert herself. Louise is all but forgotten, but makes several unsuccessful attempts to tell Larry that he is to be a father. Finally, Samantha tells Larry. He is overjoyed. Although Darrin doesn't tell Samantha about his reverie, he is reassured when she tells him she hopes they have a child who looks just like him.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.14
programme.desc: Hyung Joon officially raises the issue of the judges. The organizers eventually accept Hyung Joon's proposal to replace the judges after the corruption scandal erupts. With the pre-screening also invalidated, the competition among the candidates for the gala night intensifies, and Oh Ji Young also does her best to prepare for the gala night. ViVi Cosmetics begins product manufacturing with the investment received from Yoon, and Yoon withdraws, upon learning this.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.15
programme.desc: Jae Hee goes into hiding after hearing her father Kim Suk Chul's proposal. Director Ma visits Kim Suk Chul and asks him to return Jae Hee, but instead faces a tax investigation. As the main competition begins, Oh Ji Young gradually starts to gain attention. However, due to Yoon's scheme, ViVi Cosmetics begins to face overdue promissory notes.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.16
programme.desc: The winner of the 1997 Miss Korea 'Jin' is finally announced. Ji Young, learning that ViVi Cosmetics is on the verge of bankruptcy, is heartbroken to realize that Hyung Joon was not at the main competition because of the company.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.17
programme.desc: Ji Young hands the prize money to Hyung Joon, but he tries not to accept it. Hyung Joon's heart is both happy and complicated as he looks at Ji Young, who suggests they date secretly... Meanwhile, Ji Young prepares for the 'Miss Universe' competition. Hyung Joon asks Director Ma to take care of Ji Young, and Ji Young prepares for the international competition with Director Ma's support.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.18
programme.desc: Hyung Joon, realizing that Ji Young's birthday could become an issue, tries to find a way to protect her as much as possible. Hyung Joon tries to develop and sell a new lip gloss under the name 'V Cosmetics', but this too is not easy due to Kang Shik's interference.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.19
programme.desc: Ji Young, while preparing for Miss Universe, falls into contemplation as she sees other candidates pursuing their dreams. Ji Young takes sweet revenge on Manager Park, who visits her regarding a Dream Department Store advertisement model issue, thinking back on past times. Hwa Jung, learning that Teacher Jung has put her house up for sale to raise investment for new cosmetics, wavers over the issue of studying abroad.

programme.title: Strangers Again (English Dubbed) Ep.11

While handling divorce cases of clients who, like them, go through repeated separations and reconciliations, Ha-ra comes to a firm decision.

programme.title: Strangers Again (English Dubbed) Ep.12

programme.title: Strangers Again (English Dubbed) Ep.1
programme.desc: Two trials come to successful divorce lawyer Ha-ra. One is a precarious divorce lawsuit brought by a top star who arrives with a prenuptial agreement. The other is the declaration of office return by her ex-husband Eun-beom, who cheated on her and ran away.

programme.title: Strangers Again (English Dubbed) Ep.2
programme.desc: Ha-ra thought he had returned hoping for reconciliation, but instead her ex-husband suddenly sets her up on a blind date, something she cannot understand at all. On top of that, she has to handle a divorce lawsuit dealing with sexual issues between a married couple together with him.

programme.title: Strangers Again (English Dubbed) Ep.3

programme.title: Strangers Again (English Dubbed) Ep.4

programme.title: Wild and Alive

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In epsiode one we take a look at Kaua'i - the oldest island in the archipelago. Kaua'i's isolation for thousands of years led to an increased rate of evolution. In a relatively short time, new species are formed here, many animals and plants can only be found here. But they are in danger.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In episode two we take a look at Maui and Moloka'i. In the middle of the archipelago they form the heart of Hawaii. The second largest island of Hawai'i - Maui - is a true paradise for surfers. Archie Kalepa was one of the first big wave surfers and is still chasing the thrill today

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: It's summer on New Zealand's Open Bay Islands, and the local population swells. Wily octopus, foraging crayfish and darting penguins are joined by over 4,000 New Zealand fur seals. Masterful divers, they successfully straddle two distinct neighborhoods: beneath the waves, where they play and eat – and these rocky outcrops, where they're born and mate. Mothers balance the demands of nursing pups, mating-keen males, and their own need to efficiently hunt and feed. Everyone here has new mouths to feed, including the scavenging Weka. Unable to fly nor swim, the species was introduced as food for sealers a century ago -- and has been marooned here ever since.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: What seems calm and tranquil may not necessarily be so. Under the tranquility there maybe a vibrant dynamic world and above water there maybe dangers which are lurking at very corner.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Wild and Alive
programme.desc: In the heart of the Ivory Coast a small rural village has a very special resident. The last white rhino in the country sleeps on the village outskirts and feeds on the villagers' crops.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E01
programme.desc: In the far west of India, unexpected predators roam: lions. Living freely in a human-inhabited area without fences, they occasionally prey on the livestock of the indigenous Maldhari people, who nevertheless take pride in sharing their region with these lions—a unique coexistence of humans and predators. In northern Gujarat, desert landscapes dominate, where semi-nomadic communities breed a unique camel breed capable of swimming: Karai camels swim up to 3km daily to mangrove islands for grazing.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E02
programme.desc: In Sabah, northern Borneo, flows the 560km-long Kinabatangan River. Nowhere else in Sabah are wild animals as easily spotted as along this river: orangutans, elephants, crocodiles, and proboscis monkeys. However, biodiversity is threatened as more rainforest gives way to palm oil plantations. Wildlife ventures into inhabited areas in search of food, leading to conflicts. Locals are fighting to preserve the rainforest and its unique wildlife, demonstrating that conservation and prosperity can coexist even in a modern society.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E03
programme.desc: The jungle in northern Vietnam is nearly impenetrable, with some areas never touched by humans. The remote rainforests of Pu Mat National Park serve as a refuge for endangered wildlife such as black bears, monkeys, and pangolins. Tuan, a biologist and bear specialist, embarks on an expedition to these untouched regions of the park in search of bears. The most hunted animal here is the pangolin, sought after for its scales believed to have medicinal properties and its meat considered a delicacy. A small Vietnamese conservation organization fights for the survival of this species.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E04
programme.desc: The Great Gobi National Park in southwestern Mongolia shelters one of the last populations of wild Bactrian camels, amid its ancient and mysterious desert landscape. With around 800 critically endangered animals, the Gobi remains one of the world's most sparsely inhabited and inhospitable regions, yet its allure is undeniable, offering a captivating backdrop for encounters with wild camels and stories of people deeply connected to nature.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E05
programme.desc: The jungle in northern Vietnam is nearly impenetrable, with some areas never touched by humans. The remote rainforests of Pu Mat National Park serve as a refuge for endangered wildlife such as black bears, monkeys, and pangolins. Tuan, a biologist and bear specialist, embarks on an expedition to these untouched regions of the park in search of bears. The most hunted animal here is the pangolin, sought after for its scales believed to have medicinal properties and its meat considered a delicacy. A small Vietnamese conservation organization fights for the survival of this species.

programme.title: The Secret world of Herbs
programme.desc: Its native fragrant flowers and aromatic herbs have made the Provence a brand known worldwide. The wealth of flora found in this region, between the French Alps and the Mediterranean, is unequalled among the French provinces. Around Sault, near Mont Ventoux, the valleys and high plains are carpeted with bright violet: In the hot climate of the South of France, lavender blooms and exudes its fragrance. Monastic healers have been using its aromatic medicinal oil since the Middle Ages. And today an entire industry is based on the trade with this fragrant flower. Yet the livelihood of Provençal lavender farmers is imperiled. In France's major lavender-growing region, the “Plateau de Valensole”, our viewers encounter Gérard Blanc, who has been hit particularly hard. The lavender farmer lost sixty percent of his harvest to one tiny insect: the leafhopper. This insect has already destroyed half of the lavender acreage, bumping France from its market position as the world's top producer of lavender oil. The film visits a resolute farmer who, not about to give up, is testing methods to fend off the voracious insect.

programme.title: The Secret world of Herbs
programme.desc: In India, herbs play an everyday role hardly equalled anywhere in the world. From the tropical green south to the mountains of the northern Himalayas, herbs lend fragrance to joss sticks and soaps, and flavor to the cuisine. And, above all, herbs heal. Six thousand varieties of plants are used in India, and most are harvested in the wild – where they are becoming depleted. The ever rising need for herbal medicine for the subcontinent's 1.3 billion inhabitants comes on top of the demand of its growing middle class for herbal-based cosmetics. As a result, certain herbs have become scarce, while others have already vanished entirely. Most of the herbs in India are harvested in the wild. The progress of first cultivation attempts is slow. In India, the rural population, especially, needs affordable, well-tolerated medicine – medicine based on herbs. In Kerala, the film shows a family operation that hand-produces botanical medicine for the local market. High up in the Himalayas, we observe a village healer at work. The science of Ayurvedic medicine is five thousand years old. Today, interest in the ancient healing art is surging, not only in India. In Delhi's Old Town, the film visits a wholesaler who supplies the booming global herb market, and we take a look inside the laboratories of the largest manufacturer of Ayurvedic medicines in the world. In Kerala, we meet a doctor employed at a small Ayurveda clinic, and in Nordern India, we join a student of Tibetan medicine on a hike up into the mountains, where she prepares for an exam in herbology.

programme.title: Just Landed
programme.desc: Jim lands in Maine to meet the faces behind one of the top seafood scenes in the U.S. From Portland to North Haven, it's all about experiencing true coastal life from the Mainers' point of view. Jim then checks off a bucket list moment: smallmouth fishing on the legendary Grand Lake.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Balkan Express
programme.desc: Life in Macedonia is based on traditions, it is simple and without stress.

programme.title: Balkan Express
programme.desc: In North Serbia lies Vojvodina, which is traversed by many rivers and marshlands.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: This coast offers everything: golden sandy beaches in the south, a spectacular water labyrinth in the north. Romania and Bulgaria on the Black Sea: that is a mixture of centuries-old traditions, Eastern Bloc charm and modern Europe. Meet the people who give the region an unique face: horse rescuers, castle owners, shellfish breeders.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: The Black Sea of ​​Ukraine is diverse: swampy landscape in the Danube Delta, beach and party life around Odessa and lonely islands and huge salt lakes in the east. As different as the landscapes are the people - Old Believers who live as they did 300 years ago, young women who can be brokered through marriage agencies into a new life and children who learn German today to later connect to Western Europe.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: Russia's sunny south, a journey from the Taman peninsula to Sochi, the most famous seaside resort on the Russian Black Sea coast. Cliffs, endless beaches, Mediterranean climate - the Russian Riviera can compete with the French Riviera. The largest sparkling wine cellar in Russia, the world's northernmost tea plantation - a historic coastline with many discoveries.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: Green oases on the Black Sea, mountain chains on the coast and a dazzling metropolis. Georgia is unique. The country has only 3.7 million inhabitants. But they have traditions and customs that are not found anywhere else in the world. We show family celebrations, brave cable car guides and dancing triplets.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast
programme.desc: As wild and unpredictable as the Black Sea are the people who live on its coast - at least that is what they say in Turkey. In the fifth part of our journey, we meet young female footballers, passionate musicians in small fishing villages and up-and-coming cities and accompany a pilot through the difficult ship passage on the Bosporus to the Black Sea. In addition, the fertile coast lures with many discoveries: fishing is only one pillar of economic prosperity. In the mountainous hinterland you'll find tea, hazelnuts and tobacco.

programme.title: Travel Quest
programme.desc: They say time heals all wounds, but can it heal the most horrific of all—genocide. On this Quest, Bill returns to Rwanda to see the post-war healing happening in this small, but globally significant country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Sour wishes she could have a birthday all her very own, her twin sister Sweet grants her wish by forgoing celebrating her birthday. But what begins as a day that Sour has always dreamed of quickly becomes a disappointment when she misses her twin. With Strawberry's help, Sour gives her birthday back to Sweet with a special surprise.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival. Strawberry thinks the festival will provide a wonderful opportunity to see the world through different eyes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling "Tall Tales." So Apple tells her thrilling adventure of a wild road rally she entered, only to surprise the girls by proving the story is actually true.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Sour teasing Apple escalates into a "prank war" between the two of them. Miraculously, they emerge best buds, and their friends are relieved, until Sour's influence on Apple turns her into a mini-Sour, and they have to do a personality "makeover" on Apple.

programme.desc: It's winter and Garfield and his friends, Odie and Nermal, are competing for the price of "the best Christmas carolling singer". There are cookies at stake!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's cousin has passed away and has left his fortune to Jon and Doc Boy. But there's one condition: the one who will spend an entire night in a spooky manor will be the one to inherit everything.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Garfield slightly changes the recipe of Odie's birthday cake, it comes to life and spreads panic in town!

programme.desc: Garfield has been mean to Odie again. Left in the garden, he's taken in by a neighbour, Nathan. Odie is happy with this new friendship, but he soon discovers that Garfield wasn't that bad after all...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield takes us through the ages to tell us the history of dogs. As we know, he has a poor opinion of them, but an incident will make him change his mind. After all, all dogs are not useless!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is bored. He has nothing to do. Well, not exactly: watching Odie and the squirrels in the garden, there's fun ahead after all!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Eddie Gourmand has built a super attraction park, made completely out of cheese. Squeak and his friends beg Garfield to take them there but with Harry working as a security guard, it won't be easy!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Pooky has disappeared again, but this time, it's Nermal who finds it. He is willing to give it back to him at one condition: Garfield has to be really nice to Nermal for the rest of the day!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's cat instincts push him to climb on a tree. But how will he get down? Everyone tries to give him a hand, but they end up stuck in that tree! Now he's out on a limb who will save him?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal doesn't believe in super heroes. Garfield does and he tries desperately to convince him. Even if that means disguising himself as Ultra Powerful Guy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield receives a strange helmet which lets him read everyone's thoughts. He even catches aliens' conversations who are just about to conquer Earth! Garfield has to stop this plot immediately!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Odie dreams of being a super hero, Garfield mocks him for it. But when Garfield really gets into trouble, Odie puts his grudges aside and flies off to help him. And this time he REALLY flies!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal makes a bet with Garfield: if Garfield manages not to eat for a whole hour, he won't see Nermal for a whole month. Will Garfield be victorious ?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A caveman has been found in a block of ice. When Garfield accidentally thaws him, he falls in love with Olga. But if there's no caveman in the new exhibit, the museum will be ruined!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new employee at the pound: it's a robot with all the latest gadgets and it's job to make all the pets stick to the straight and narrow!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Tis the holiday season for Garfield and the whole gang. Jon has invited not only his parents and Doc Boy, but Liz's family as well, and so Garfield must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield make the cutest cat in the country look ugly? It won't be easy but our orange friend is VERY motivated...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield get rid of Aunt Ivy, who hates animals? Garfield has an idea.

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield, from now on, you're on a diet! Don't argue, it's for your own good!
